commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Say, I pray you, that you are my sister: that it may be well with me for your sake; and my soul shall live because of you. This was no lie; because she was his niece, being daughter to his brother Aran, and therefore, in the style of the Hebrews, she might truly be called his sister; as Lot is called Abraham's brother. (Genesis xiv. ) See Genesis xx. (Challoner) Others say, Sarai was the half-sister of Abraham, by another mother.
